auth.securityQuestionsNotConfigured: Ibibazo byumutekano ntabwo byashyizweho kuriyi konti
auth.seedPhraseHint: Niba wibagiwe ijambo ryibanga, iyi nteruro niyo nzira yonyine yo kugarura konti yawe. Andika ku mpapuro kandi ubike ahantu hizewe.
auth.passkeyNotSupported: Mucukumbuzi yawe ntabwo ishigikira Passkey / WebAuthn

settings.title: Igenamiterere
settings.name: Izina
settings.geoFailed: Kunanirwa kumenya aho uri. Reba ko GPS/Wi-Fi ifunguye.
settings.geoNotSupported: Geolocation ntishyigikiwe na porogaramu yawe y'urubuga
settings.geoTimeout: Igihe cyo gushakisha aho uri cyarangiye. Gerageza ahantu havuye hejuru.
settings.speaker: Orateur
settings.ttlPrompt: Nyuma yiminsi ingahe yo kudakora konti igomba gusibwa?
settings.sqQuestion1: Amatungo yawe ya mbere yitwa nde?
settings.sqSetupDesc: Niba wibagiwe ijambo ryibanga, urashobora kugarura uburyo bwo gusubiza ibibazo 3. Urashobora gukoresha ibibazo byawe bwite cyangwa nibisanzwe.
settings.pwReminderDesc: Kugenzura buri kwezi - menya neza ko wibuka ijambo ryibanga ryinjira.
settings.pwIncorrectDesc: Turasaba kuvugurura ijambo ryibanga mugihe winjiye, kugirango udatakaza kwinjira.
settings.clearCacheConfirm:
Kuraho cache itangazamakuru namakuru yigihe gito?

Encryption urufunguzo nigenamiterere ntabwo bizasibwa.
settings.sessionTooYoungForPwChange:
Isomo rigomba gukora byibuze iminsi 7 kugirango uhindure ijambo ryibanga.

Igihe gisigaye: {iminsi Ibumoso} iminsi.
settings.waitDaysWarning: Iminsi 7 ntirashira. Nyamuneka tegereza {iminsi Ibumoso} iminsi myinshi.
settings.geoDeniedMac:
Kwinjira muri geolokisiyo byanze.

1. MacOS: Igenamiterere rya sisitemu → Ibanga Services Serivisi zaho → zifasha mushakisha
2. Mucukumbuzi: kanda igishushanyo cyo gufunga muri aderesi ya aderesi → Ahantu → Emerera
3. Ongera usubiremo urupapuro
settings.geoDeniedOther:
Kwinjira muri geolokisiyo byanze.

Kanda igishushanyo cyo gufunga muri adresse adresse → Ahantu → Emera, hanyuma usubiremo page
settings.autoDeleteHint: Siba konte nyuma yigihe cyo kudakora

call.groupCallNotice: Guhamagarira itsinda - abagize ibyumba byose bazakira ubutumire

fingerprint.showQR: Garura QR code kugira ngo undi muntu bayisuzume
fingerprint.title: Kwemeza urufunguzo

panic.callSettingsNote: Menya: Imyanya ya Force TCP na Relay irashobora kongerera ubuhendutsi ariko iha ubwigenge bwuzuye. Gufunika trafike kongeraho umusumari uteganyijwe mu biganiro bya SDP.
panic.desc: Amakuru yose kuri iyi node azasibwa burundu. Iyi mikorere ntishobora gusubirwa.
panic.warningBody:
Ugiye gusenya burundu amakuru yose.
Iki gikorwa ntigishobora gusubirwaho.
panic.allTracesRemoved: Inzira zose zavanyweho. Iki cyiciro kirarangiye.

privacy.autoKeySyncHint: Urufunguzo rushya rw'icyumba rukerehezwa — ohereza by'ikigereranyo kuri buri kikoresho cyawe (E2E ibitswe)
privacy.backupHint: Bika urufunguzo rwose hifashishwa ijambo ry'ibanga ukabika kuri seriveri. Mu guhindura igikoresho — subiza hifashishwa inzira imwe.
privacy.crossSignHint: Emeza ibikoresho bishya by'ikigereranyo binyuze mu igisina cya HMAC (kurinda gusimbuza)
privacy.federatedHint: Sangira ingingo za backup ibitswe ku nodes za federation. Nubwo seriveri yaburiye — subiza binyuze ku bagenzi.
privacy.historySyncHint: Kopi y'ubutumwa ibitswe iraboneka kuri buri kikoresho. Seriveri ireba inkokora gusa
privacy.ktHint: Iyandikwa ryongerera gusa ry'inyandiko zose z'urufunguzo rwa rubanda hifashishwa ingorofa ya hash (Merkle). Seriveri isinyanura buri kwandikwa — ubinyoma bubonetse mu gihe cy'igenzura.
privacy.linkDeviceHint: Ohereza urufunguzo ku gikoresho gishya binyuze mu kode y'imibare 6. Urufunguzo rwitiriwe ECIES — seriveri ntishobora kubusoma.
privacy.ssssHint: Tanya urufunguzo nyamukuru mu bice N. Bice bibi M byasubiza urufunguzo. Igice cyose cyitiriwe uwo batumanahana bizewe runaka (ECIES). Seriveri ireba blobs zibitswe gusa.
privacy.title: Ubwigenge

contactSync.title: Shakisha aho uhurira
contactSync.desc: Reba imwe muri terefone yawe isanzwe kuri Vortex. Inomero za terefone zirakaraba - seriveri ntizigera ibabona.

keyBackup.passphraseMinLen: Ijambo ryibanga rigomba kuba byibuze inyuguti 8
keyBackup.enterCodeOnMain: Injira iyi code kubikoresho byawe nyamukuru
keyBackup.passphraseEncryptHint: Injira ijambo ryibanga kugirango uhishe. Ibuka - gukira bitabaye ibyo ntibishoboka.
keyBackup.passphraseRestoreHint: Injira ijambo ryibanga wakoresheje mugihe ukora backup.
keyBackup.deleteBackupConfirm: Gusiba urufunguzo rwibanze? Iki gikorwa ntigisubirwaho.
keyBackup.revokeSharesConfirm: Kuraho imigabane yose yingenzi? Gukira binyuze mumikoranire yizewe ntibizashoboka.
keyBackup.splitKeyDesc: Urufunguzo rwa shobuja ruzagabanywa muri N imigabane ukoresheje gahunda ya Shamir. Umugabane wose M uzemerera urufunguzo rwo gukira. Buri mugabane uhishe muburyo bwihariye bwizewe.
keyBackup.minTwoPeers: Nibura urungano 2 rukora hamwe na encryption isabwa
keyBackup.deleteFederatedConfirm: Gusiba ububiko bwa federasiyo? Igice kuri urungano kizagumaho, ariko metadata izabura.

botConstructor.title: Bot Constructor
botConstructor.subtitle: Build your bot visually — no code needed
botConstructor.welcomeMessage: Welcome message when user starts the bot...
botConstructor.defaultWelcome: Welcome! I am your bot. Use /help to see commands.
botConstructor.docsCommand: Responds when a user sends a specific command (e.g. /help, /start). You can add conversation steps to create multi-step dialogs.
botConstructor.docsMessage: Responds when a user message matches a pattern. Uses regex — e.g. "hello|hi" matches both words. Case-insensitive.
botConstructor.docsWelcome: The first message users see when they start the bot with /start. Every bot should have one.
botConstructor.docsScheduled: Sends a message automatically on a schedule. Great for daily reminders, weekly digests, or periodic announcements.
botConstructor.docsCondition: Branches the bot logic. Check a variable or user input and respond differently based on the result.
botConstructor.docsRandom: Bot picks one response randomly from the list. Perfect for jokes, tips, greetings, or varied responses.
botConstructor.docsApi: Makes an HTTP request to an external API and uses the response in the bot message. Use {data.field} to reference response fields.
botConstructor.docsAdminNotify: Sends a notification to the room admin when triggered. Useful for alerts, new user notifications, or moderation.
botConstructor.docsConversationsDesc: Add steps to a Command block to create interactive dialogs. Each step asks a question, waits for the user answer, and saves it to a variable. Use variables in the final response with {variableName}.
botConstructor.docsVariablesDesc: Use curly braces {variable} in response text to insert dynamic values. State variables persist across messages.
botConstructor.docsBuiltinVars: Built-in variables available in every response:
botConstructor.docsFormattingDesc: You can use HTML-like formatting in responses:
botConstructor.docsTip1: Start with a Welcome block — it is the first thing users see
botConstructor.docsTip2: Add a /help command that lists all available commands
botConstructor.docsTip3: Use conversation steps for registration, surveys, or data collection
botConstructor.docsTip4: Combine Condition blocks with variables for smart branching
botConstructor.docsTip5: Test your bot by talking to it in a room after deploying
